primaryPeers.name: SK hynix
primaryPeers.notes: Direct DRAM/NAND peer. Most comparable pure-play memory company.

primaryPeers.name: Samsung Electronics
primaryPeers.notes: Memory is dominant but mixed with foundry, mobile, display. Use with conglomerate penalty.

secondaryPeers.name: Western Digital
secondaryPeers.notes: NAND flash peer after spin-off. HDD business reduces direct comparability.

caveats: Few clean public pure-play memory peers exist globally
Samsung requires conglomerate adjustment (memory ~60% of OP)
SK hynix disclosure follows Korean GAAP/IFRS with different timing
WDC comparability reduced by HDD business mix
All peer multiples are curated snapshots, not live pipeline-derived
